campaignEffect: Campaign landing pages converted demo requests at 5.1% against the 4.7% case-study-led benchmark, and campaign-sourced deals closed in an average of 81 days versus the 94-day category norm, delivering a partner-sourced pipeline worth roughly 3x the media investment at the $24,000 average annual contract value.
reason: Won a three-agency review; client highlighted the quantified rationale behind each channel choice.
